# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud compute security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 10,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Number of developer VMs to create (1-10)"
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_B2s",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_B1s",
        "Standard_B2s",
        "Standard_B2ms",
        "Standard_D2s_v3",
        "Standard_D4s_v3"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the virtual machines"
      }
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Linux",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Linux",
        "Windows"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Operating system type for the VMs"
      }
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 20,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator username for the VMs"
      }
    },
    "authenticationType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sshPublicKey",
      "allowedValues": [
        "sshPublicKey",
        "password"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Authentication type for Linux VMs. SSH key is strongly recommended."
      }
    },
    "adminPasswordOrKey": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SSH public key or password. SSH key recommended for Linux."
      }
    },
    "allowedSourceIPPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "REQUIRED: Your office/VPN CIDR range (e.g., 203.0.113.0/24). Do NOT use 0.0.0.0/0 or *."
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev",
      "allowedValues": [
        "dev",
        "staging"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Environment tag. Production workloads should use Bastion/VPN instead."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for all resources"
      }
    },
    "autoShutdownTime": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "1900",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Auto-shutdown time in 24hr format (e.g., 1900 for 7PM) to reduce cost and attack surface"
      }
    },
    "autoShutdownTimeZone": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "UTC",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Time zone for auto-shutdown schedule"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetName": "[concat('vnet-devvm-', parameters('environment'))]",
    "vnetAddressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/16",
    "subnetName": "snet-devvms",
    "subnetAddressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24",
    "nsgName": "[concat('nsg-devvm-', parameters('environment'))]",
    "linuxConfiguration": {
      "disablePasswordAuthentication": true,
      "ssh": {
        "publicKeys": [
          {
            "path": "[concat('/home/', parameters('adminUsername'), '/.ssh/authorized_keys')]",
            "keyData": "[parameters('adminPasswordOrKey')]"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "windowsImageReference": {
      "publisher": "MicrosoftWindowsDesktop",
      "offer": "windows-11",
      "sku": "win11-22h2-pro",
      "version": "latest"
    },
    "linuxImageReference": {
      "publisher": "Canonical",
      "offer": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy",
      "sku": "22_04-lts-gen2",
      "version": "latest"
    },
    "sshPort": "22",
    "rdpPort": "3389",
    "accessPort": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), variables('sshPort'), variables('rdpPort'))]",
    "accessProtocol": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), 'SSH', 'RDP')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[variables('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "purpose": "developer-vm-access",
        "managedBy": "arm-template"
      },
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "[concat('Allow-', variables('accessProtocol'), '-FromAllowedSource')]",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[variables('accessPort')]",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "description": "[concat('Allow ', variables('accessProtocol'), ' from approved IP range only')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 4000,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Deny",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "description": "Explicit deny-all for any traffic not matching above rules"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[variables('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "purpose": "developer-vm-network"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "vmName": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1))]"
      },
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard",
        "tier": "Regional"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
        "publicIPAddressVersion": "IPv4",
        "ddosSettings": {
          "protectionMode": "VirtualNetworkInherited"
        }
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIPCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[concat('nic-devvm-', copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "vmName": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        "networkSecurityGroup": {
          "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
        }
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "purpose": "developer-workstation",
        "autoShutdown": "enabled"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat('nic-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat('devvm', copyIndex(1))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[if(or(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'password')), parameters('adminPasswordOrKey'), null())]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(and(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'sshPublicKey')), variables('linuxConfiguration'), null())]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), variables('linuxImageReference'), variables('windowsImageReference'))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            },
            "diskSizeGB": 128,
            "encryptionSettings": {
              "enabled": false
            }
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat('nic-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))]",
              "properties": {
                "primary": true
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "diagnosticsProfile": {
          "bootDiagnostics": {
            "enabled": true
          }
        },
        "securityProfile": {
          "securityType": "TrustedLaunch",
          "uefiSettings": {
            "secureBootEnabled": true,
            "vTpmEnabled": true
          }
        }
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-15",
      "name": "[concat('shutdown-computevm-vm-dev-', copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "[parameters('environment')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "status": "Enabled",
        "taskType": "ComputeVmShutdownTask",
        "dailyRecurrence": {
          "time": "[parameters('autoShutdownTime')]"
        },
        "timeZoneId": "[parameters('autoShutdownTimeZone')]",
        "targetResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1)))]",
        "notificationSettings": {
          "status": "Enabled",
          "timeInMinutes": 30,
          "notificationLocale": "en"
        }
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "shutdownCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1), '/GuestAttestation')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publisher": "Microsoft.Azure.Security.LinuxAttestation",
        "type": "GuestAttestation",
        "typeHandlerVersion": "1.0",
        "autoUpgradeMinorVersion": true,
        "enableAutomaticUpgrade": true
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "linuxAttestationCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1), '/GuestAttestation')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publisher": "Microsoft.Azure.Security.WindowsAttestation",
        "type": "GuestAttestation",
        "typeHandlerVersion": "1.0",
        "autoUpgradeMinorVersion": true,
        "enableAutomaticUpgrade": true
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "windowsAttestationCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmDetails": {
      "type": "array",
      "copy": {
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]",
        "input": {
          "vmName": "[concat('vm-dev-', copyIndex(1))]",
          "publicIPAddress": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))).ipAddress]",
          "privateIPAddress": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat('nic-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress]",
          "connectionCommand": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), concat('ssh ', parameters('adminUsername'), '@', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))).ipAddress), concat('mstsc /v:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('pip-devvm-', copyIndex(1)))).ipAddress))]"
        }
      }
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('nsgName')]"
    },
    "allowedSourceIP": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix')]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "ipRestriction": "[concat('Access restricted to: ', parameters('allowedSourceIPPrefix'))]",
        "autoShutdown": "[concat('VMs auto-shutdown daily at ', parameters('autoShutdownTime'), ' ', parameters('autoShutdownTimeZone'))]",
        "trustedLaunch": "Secure Boot and vTPM enabled on all VMs",
        "nsgApplied": "NSG applied at both subnet and NIC level",
        "recommendation": "For production workloads, migrate to Azure Bastion or VPN Gateway"
      }
    }
  }
}
